titleStmt.title: SII 18.164: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 164. (B.K. No. 38 of 1933-34.) BAMMANKAṬṬI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla Vīra-Sōmēśvaradēva and records a grant of land made by Mahāpradhāna Dāsamarasa, Sandhivigrahi Bammiyaṇa, Tantrahāḷa (Tantrapāḷa) Viṭṭayya and Daṇḍanāyaka Kēs11avadēva, (after requesting ?) Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vikramādityadēva of the Gutta family. The gift was made in the presence of Rājaguru Kalyāṇadēva for the purpose of effecting certain repairs etc., to a temple (name lost). Rājadhāni Guttoḷal (modern Guttal in Haveri Taluk) is mentioned. The genealogy of Vikramāditya is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svastisamastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpri
thvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka sa
tyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvana
mallavīsōmēśvaradēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpa
jīvi mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāyaka karituragapaṭṭasāhaṇi vīrabamma
dēvarasaru kuṁtaḷōrvviyoḷuḷḷa samasta dēśaṁgaḷaṁ duṣṭanigra
haśiṣṭapratipāḷanadindāḷuttamiralā dēśaṁgaḷoḷutukṛṣṭa
mappa banavase paṁnircchāsirada guttavaṁśada maṁḍaḷēśvarananvaya
prabhāvameṁtene . kṣitinuta vikramāṁkanṛpa tattanuja vibhu jō
mabhūbhujaṁgatiśayamenalātanoḍavuṭṭida guttara saṁge
puṭṭidaṁ śrutaramaṇīya padmaravi
bhūnutanene vīra nāḷdire banavāsidēśa
maṁ . tatpādapadmōpajīvi[gaḷu . śrīmanmahā]pradhāna haḍapada ya
ṇna dāsamarastharasuṁ sandhivigrahi bammiyaṁaṁgaḷuṁ
taṁtrahāḷa viṭṭayyaṁgaḷuṁ daṁḍanāyaka kēśavadēvanuṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ vīra vikramāditya dēvaṁge śrīmadrājagu
rukalyāṇadēvara saṁnidhānadoḷu śrī madrājadhā
ni guttoḷala baḷiya verggaḍe
yara magaṁ paḍisalisu
doḍḍiya
bāgadali mattaru
damaged
svadattāṁ sahasrāṇi
viṣṭhā
worn out
cāryyara
khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ
riya keṟeya na kōḍiya
keyiṁ mūḍa
Ereya keyi mattaru . maṁgaḷa ma
hāśrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
